# צליל התנועה - כשאותיות הופכות למילים — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Tzlil HaTnua ('The Vowel Sound') is an Israeli educational brand offering a complete, adventure-themed reading learning kit for children aged 5–7. The brand transforms the process of learning to read into a joyful, empowering journey — combining 40 graded reading booklets, a treasure-map journey chart, success stickers, and a graduation certificate. The visual identity draws on a magical nautical adventure world with motifs like enchanted islands, treasure maps, anchors, compasses, stars, waves, and gold coins — executed in a clean, elegant, minimalist style using soft teal, turquoise, white, sand, and light gold. The brand speaks to parents who want to confidently guide their child's reading journey at home, emphasizing warmth, trust, professional methodology, and genuine moments of success.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://-779d5071.zappy5.app
הפכו את לימוד הקריאה להרפתקה קסומה עם ערכה חינוכית ייחודית מבית צליל התנועה. 40 חוברות, מפת אוצר ומדבקות הצלחה מחכים לכם. התחילו עוד היום!

- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About צליל התנועה - כשאותיות הופכות למילים
Tzlil HaTnua ('The Vowel Sound') is an Israeli educational brand offering a complete, adventure-themed reading learning kit for children aged 5–7. The brand transforms the process of learning to read into a joyful, empowering journey — combining 40 graded reading booklets, a treasure-map journey chart, success stickers, and a graduation certificate. The visual identity draws on a magical nautical adventure world with motifs like enchanted islands, treasure maps, anchors, compasses, stars, waves, and gold coins — executed in a clean, elegant, minimalist style using soft teal, turquoise, white, sand, and light gold. The brand speaks to parents who want to confidently guide their child's reading journey at home, emphasizing warmth, trust, professional methodology, and genuine moments of success.

## Target Audience
- הורים לילדי גן חובה וכיתה א', גילאי 5–7
- הורים לילדי גן חובה וכיתה א'
- אנשי חינוך וחינוך מיוחד
- הורים מחנכי בית
- חינוך ביתי

## Industry
Educational Products
